title: ipomoea littoralis
intro: Ipomoea littoralis, also known as Beach Morning Glory or Seashore Morning Glory, is a species of flowering plant in the Convolvulaceae family that is native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been shown to have potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and fighting off infections. The health benefits of Ipomoea littoralis include its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, as well as its potential to act as an antiseptic and antispasmodic. Ipomoea littoralis can be prepared in herbal form through teas, infusions, and extracts, although it is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using any medicinal plant for therapeutic purposes.
